//: taskctl.config.json — optional config layer. Every field is optional; absence resolves to a project-neutral default (never an origin-project value).
//repoPath: Source repo the worktree/prompts target. Relative values resolve against THIS file's dir, so '.' is portable across machines. If omitted, a repo-needing command errors unless --repo-path or REPO_PATH is set (there is NO built-in default repo).
//tracker: Selects the task source. 'local' = no tracker (create tasks with `taskctl new`). 'jira' = wrap the Jira flow (requires JIRA_* env; JIRA_PROJECT_KEY stays ENV-ONLY, never JSON). tracker.assigneeEmail (optional) auto-assigns the Jira issue on publish --jira; omit to skip auto-assign.
//branches: integration = worktree base + review diff base (default 'dev'). prTarget = PR base for publish (defaults to integration).
//engines: planner/reviewer = default engine names (default 'claude'/'codex'). reasoningEffort = codex reasoning tier (default 'high').
//promptLanguage: 'en' (default) or 'ru'. Selects the prompt-pack language only; both packs carry project-neutral semantics.
//projectContext: Optional string[] of verbatim '## Project Context' lines for context.md (e.g. tech stack, docs). Omitted when empty.
//constraints: Optional string[] of verbatim '## Constraints' lines for context.md. Omitted when empty.
//codeAreas: Optional keyword -> string[] map driving the 'Relevant Code Areas' heuristic. Omitted -> a generic 'src/' stub.
//previewUrlTemplate: Optional preview URL with a {pr} placeholder (e.g. 'https://pr{pr}.example.com/'). Omitted -> no preview line in the Jira comment.
//grace: Optional GRACE governance (opt-in, default disabled). { enabled, repoRoot, pilotBranch, upstreamBranch }.

constraints: PRs only, no direct commits to the integration branch
